title: lotononis serpens
intro: Lotononis serpens, also known as the snake flower, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The root and stem of the plant have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, providing various health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Lotononis serpens are typically made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
